task: Put the napkin more towards the top of the stove.
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue cloth napkin rests on a stovetop. The napkin is a flat, flexible object. STRATEGY - The task is to reposition the napkin closer to the top of the stovetop. Since the napkin is already on the stovetop, the action involves grasping it and moving it to a new location on the same surface. Failure modes include dropping the napkin or moving it off the stovetop. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the napkin at its body for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the napkin for secure hold; Step 3 transport the napkin to the desired position on the stovetop; Step 4 place the napkin gently to avoid sliding.
Goal: on(napkin, stovetop); stable(napkin)
Scene: napkin, stovetop
Step 1: reach(napkin)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue cloth napkin
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, napkin, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, napkin) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(napkin)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue cloth napkin
  contact: holding(napkin) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(napkin)
Step 3: transport(napkin -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the stovetop near the top
  spatial: above(napkin, stovetop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(napkin)
  done_when: above(napkin, stovetop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(napkin -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the stovetop near the top
  contact: surface_contact(napkin, stovetop) [completion]; released(napkin) [completion]
  pose: stable(napkin) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(napkin, stovetop) AND released(napkin)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue cloth napkin
the body of the blue cloth napkin
an empty area on the stovetop near the top
an empty area on the stovetop near the top
